title: Gmail label node fails after merge node
symptom: The Gmail label node fails with the error 'Multiple matching items for item [1] [item 1]' when placed after a merge node. It works correctly when placed before the merge node.
applies_when: Data is merged using a merge node
not_this_if: Gmail label node is placed before the merge node
root_cause: The error occurs because the merge node may not preserve the necessary message ID required by the Gmail label node. If the data is not perfectly aligned or if the message ID is lost during the merge, the Gmail label node cannot find the correct item to label.
fix_steps: Change the merge node configuration to use 'mergeByKey' instead of 'combineByPosition'.
Set the property names for the merge to match the message ID fields from both sources.
Add a Set node before the merge to explicitly store the message ID in a clear property.
Update the Gmail label node to reference the stored message ID from the Set node.
agent_instruction: Configure the merge node to use 'mergeByKey' and ensure the message ID is preserved through a Set node.
